overall.description: Game engine footage from a bus simulator depicting a first-person driver's perspective during a heavy rainstorm. The bus navigates wet urban streets, stops at intersections, and picks up passengers at a bus stop while windshield wipers operate continuously.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban arterial road with commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: driving steadily behind a white truck on a multi-lane urban road during heavy rain

notable_agents.action: white box truck driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: large white delivery truck directly ahead on the road
modern multi-story building with reflective glass facade
tram or trolley wires spanning across the street

segments.scene_description: The bus drives along a wet multi-lane urban street during a heavy downpour, following a white delivery truck. Commercial buildings with glass facades line the right side while windshield wipers sweep rain from the view. The dashboard and rearview mirrors are prominently visible in the foreground.

events.description: bus slows and stops at red traffic light at the intersection
bus executes a left turn at the intersection onto a tree-lined avenue

agents.ego_description: navigating through an intersection, stopping at the traffic light before turning left

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal assembly showing red light
row of mature deciduous trees lining the approaching street

segments.scene_description: The bus approaches a traffic intersection, stopping at the red light before executing a left turn. The white truck and commercial building from the previous segment disappear from view as the bus turns onto a new street lined with residential buildings and trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined urban boulevard with residential buildings

agents.ego_description: cruising along a tree-lined avenue with moderate traffic

entered.detail: covered bus stop shelter with glass panels and bench
grass strip separating the road lanes

segments.scene_description: The bus travels along a wet residential boulevard flanked by mature trees and apartment buildings. The traffic lights from the intersection recede behind as the bus approaches a bus stop shelter visible on the right side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus stop zone with passenger shelter

events.description: bus comes to a complete stop at the designated bus stop
bus door opens to allow waiting passengers to board

agents.ego_description: stopped at the bus stop with doors open to allow passenger boarding

notable_agents.action: woman in light-colored clothing entering the bus through the front door

entered.detail: signpost indicating the bus stop location and route information

segments.scene_description: The bus pulls up to the bus stop and comes to a halt. The front door opens and passengers begin boarding from the shelter on the right. The interior of the bus becomes visible through the open door as people enter from the rainy street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus driver's seat as the vehicle navigates a heavy rainstorm, transitioning from a commercial urban corridor to a quiet residential stop. It begins by following a white delivery truck along a wet multi-lane street lined with glass-facade buildings, with windshield wipers constantly clearing the rain from the view. As the bus reaches a traffic intersection, it comes to a halt at a red light before executing a left turn that shifts the scenery from commercial architecture to a boulevard flanked by mature trees and apartment buildings. The camera then glides forward along this residential stretch until a bus stop shelter appears on the right. Finally, the bus pulls over and comes to a complete stop, opening its front door to allow passengers to board from the rainy street into the vehicle's interior.
